description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a modern, open-plan layout, surrounded by a well-maintained yard and several large trees. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of light gray and white exterior walls, with multiple large windows allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a garage, and a spacious backyard area with green lawns and scattered shrubs. The front entryway is defined by a paved path leading to a prominent main door, flanked by minimal landscaping and a small porch. The house is divided into distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas, with visible interior furnishings and open spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, a driveway, and a garage. The design is open and functional, with clear divisions between living spaces and outdoor areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the left side of the house, showing the large tree, backyard, and a clear view of the garage and driveway.
description_view_1: From above and slightly to the front, this view emphasizes the driveway, two parked cars, main entryway, and the front yard landscaping.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible here, showcasing the backyard, patio area, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the back wall.
description_view_3: This angle focuses on the right side of the house, with the large tree in the foreground and a clear view of the side yard and secondary entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved path, small porch, and a prominent single door, minimal decorative elements
